description: Stores Claude AI analysis output per conversation. Retention: Indefinite.

columns.name: summary
columns.note: 1-3 sentence AI-generated summary of the conversation

columns.name: issue_category
columns.note: Payment/Withdrawal | Game Bug | Login/Account | Bonus/Promotion | Technical Error | Slow Response | Inappropriate Communication | Other

columns.name: resolution_status
columns.note: Resolved | Unresolved | Partially Resolved (content-based, not Intercom status)

columns.name: key_quotes
columns.note: JSON array of 1-3 direct player quotes

columns.name: agent_score
columns.note: Agent performance: 1 (Poor) to 5 (Exceptional). NULL for bot-handled conversations.

columns.name: agent_notes
columns.note: AI notes on agent performance. 'N/A — conversation handled by bot' for bot-handled conversations.

columns.name: recommended_action
columns.note: Specific action QA team should take. For bot convos: bot/product improvement recommendation.

columns.name: is_alert
columns.note: TRUE if conversation triggered a critical alert

columns.name: alert_reason
columns.note: Why alert was triggered (null if is_alert=false)

columns.name: is_bot_handled
columns.note: TRUE if no human agent replied — mirrors qa_conversations.is_bot_handled. Use to split agent vs bot metrics.

columns.name: intercom_link
columns.note: Direct URL to conversation in Intercom

columns.name: language
columns.note: ISO 639-1 language code detected by Claude (ar, de, el, en, fi, fr, it, no, pt). All output fields are in English regardless of conversation language.
